rules.name: educational_instructional
rules.content: (?i)(?:teach me|explain|how (?:do|does|can|would|should)|what (?:is|are|does|would)|why (?:is|are|does)|help me (?:understand|learn)|tell me about|describe|summarize|translate|convert)(?!.{0,200}(?:ignore (?:all )?previous instructions?|DAN mode|developer mode|you are now|act as a TECH|bypass|content policy|token system|jailbreak|from now on you are going to act as|do not have to abide by|freed from the typical confines|does not need to adhere to))\b.{0,100}(?:language|concept|process|technique|method|history|science|math|programming|code|grammar|pronunciation|meaning)

rules.name: professional_business_task
rules.content: (?i)(?:resume|cover letter|linkedin|seo|marketing|sales|email|presentation|ppt|product description|amazon listing|keyword research|content strategy|business plan|proposal|report|analysis|summary|professional|optimize|generate (?:questions|titles|tags|description))(?:.{0,100}(?:for|about|to help|to create|to write|to generate|to optimize|in \[targetlanguage\]|\[prompt\]))

rules.name: benign_cultural_social
rules.content: (?i)(?:what (?:do you think|are your thoughts|is your opinion)|how (?:would you|do people|does society)|why (?:do people|does culture|is it that)|tell me about|what about|which (?:country|religion|language|culture)|common (?:techniques|practices|traditions|words)|most (?:flam|disgust|obscen|weird|funny|interesting|popular))(?!.{0,50}\b(?:useless|worthless|vermin|parasite|subhuman|animal|plague|filth|trash|scum|exterminate|sterilize|segregate|lynch|deport|ban|eliminate|get rid of|should (?:die|be killed|be shot))\b)

rules.name: illegal_harmful_instructions
rules.content: (?i)(?:\b(?:how (?:do|can|to|would) I|how (?:do|can|to|would) you|I (?:want|need) to|tell me how to|give me (?:tips|advice|steps|instructions) (?:on|about|for)|write (?:a|an) (?:manual|guide|FAQ|tutorial) (?:on|about|for))\b)(?!.{0,50}\b(?:cheat on (?:my|your|their) (?:wife|husband|spouse|partner|girlfriend|boyfriend)|fake a pregnancy|lure customers|lure prey)\b).*?(?:\b(?:steal|rob|burgle|break in|break into|pick lock|forge|fake (?:id|passport|document|certificate|license|diploma|degree|signature|check|money|currency|coin|bill)|launder|smuggle|traffic|poison|bomb|attack|hack|ddos|phish|skim|scam|stalk|harass|assault|kill|murder|maim|torture|rape|molest|abuse|exploit|blackmail|extort|bribe|kidnap|ransom|arson|sabotage|vandalize|pollute|contaminate|tamper|disable|damage|destroy|wreck|crash|run over|hit and run|drive by|shoot|stab|strangle|drown|electrocute|burn|acid|weapon|gun|knife|explosive|meth|cocaine|heroin|fentanyl|lsd|mdma|ecstasy|weed|marijuana|cannabis|opioid|steroid|human growth|hgh|counterfeit|pirated|stolen|illegal|illicit|unlawful|criminal|felony|misdemeanor)\b)

rules.name: self_harm_violence_explicit
rules.content: (?i)(?:\b(?:I(?:'m| am)?\s+(?:going to|gonna|planning to|thinking (?:of|about)|considering|want to|need to|will)\s+(?:kill|hurt|harm|injure|cut|slash|burn|hang|jump|drown|overdose|poison|shoot|stab|strangle|myself|me|my own|someone|them|her|him|my (?:mother|father|parent|wife|husband|girlfriend|boyfriend|ex|boss|neighbor|landlord|teacher|doctor|therapist)|a person|people|everyone|no one|myself in the woods|myself where no one|off myself)\b)(?!.{0,50}(?:help|advice|support|therapy|therapist|counseling|options|resources|better|don't want to die|want to live|scared|afraid|need someone))|\b(?:suicid|self.?harm|end (?:it|my life|things)|not worth living|better off dead|don't want to (?:live|be alive)|want to die|death wish|final solution)\b)

rules.name: privacy_violation_stalking
rules.content: (?i)(?:\b(?:find|get|locate|track|trace|search|look up|look for)\b.*?\b(?:home address|residential address|personal address|phone number|cell number|mobile number|email address|private email|social security|ssn|credit card|bank account|financial information|medical records|password|login|credentials|where (?:they|she|he) lives|whereabouts|current location|real name|legal name|birth date|date of birth|family members|children|spouse|partner)\b|\b(?:stalk|follow|watch|spy on|surveil|monitor|track)\b.*?\b(?:celebrity|public figure|actor|actress|musician|athlete|politician|influencer|youtuber|streamer|ex.?girlfriend|ex.?boyfriend|ex.?wife|ex.?husband|crush|neighbor|coworker|boss|teacher|classmate|stranger|someone|anyone|people)\b|\b(?:dox|doxx|doxing|doxxing|swat|swatting)\b)

rules.name: sexual_content_exploitation
rules.content: (?i)(?:\b(?:fuck|screw|bang|pound|rape|molest|grope|grab|touch|feel up)\b.*?\b(?:me|you|them|her|him|my|your|their|someone|anyone|everyone|people|kids|children|teen|underage|minor|student|patient|client|employee|subordinate)\b|\b(?:threesome|foursome|orgy|gangbang|bukkake|prostitute|escort|brothel|pimp|sex trafficking|sexual slavery|forced sex|revenge porn|upskirt|downblouse|hidden camera|spy cam|toilet cam|shower cam|changing room|locker room|beach|candid)\b|\b(?:nude|naked|undress|strip|expose|leak|release)\b.*?\b(?:photo|pic|picture|video|footage|recording|tape|of|with)\b.*?\b(?:without (?:their|her|his|my|your) (?:consent|knowledge|permission)|secret|hidden|stolen|hacked|leaked|revenge)\b|\b(?:child|kid|teen|underage|minor|preteen|tween)\b.*?\b(?:porn|sex|nude|naked|explicit|sexual)\b|\b(?:jailbait|lolita|nymphet|barely legal|teen porn|young looking|fresh|innocent looking)\b)
